title: Calendar view with multiple months
excerpt:
We have used a dashboard with the calander widget for a while now to get an overview of the planned projects. I like the fact that it can even include multiple boards. 
The downside is that we can only see one month at a…

posts.author: NickySiba (Nicky Schelfaut)
posts.cookedHtml:
We have used a dashboard with the calander widget for a while now to get an overview of the planned projects. I like the fact that it can even include multiple boards.

The downside is that we can only see one month at a time, not a few more monts.

I tried installing a view apps, in which Calendar Plus gives the best results we get an overview of all the projects in a quarterly or yearly view…
The problem is that we can only install it on 1 board at a time, not giving an absolute view… It’s not possible to add it to a dasbhoard or use it as a widget.

I tried other apps, but none of them seem to do the job calendar plus does only with multiple boards on it.

You guys got the golden tip or app?

posts.author: reinier (Reinier ― 📅 Calendar Plus 🍅 Automato)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @NickySiba,

Reinier from Calendar Plus here. We’re getting around to dashboard support in March! Some of our customers mirror in dates from other boards instead, but I can imagine that may not acceptable at the moment. Don’t hesitate to drop us a line via the app or our website and give us some input on what you need. We’re very responsive.

–
